description_long: This cowshed is a rectangular, single-story agricultural building with a prominent gable roof clad in red metal panels. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal light-colored wooden planks, giving it a rustic yet sturdy appearance. The front features a large, vertically-planked sliding barn door with black metal hinges, providing wide access for livestock or equipment. The roof overhangs slightly, offering some protection from the elements at the entry. There are no visible windows or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function. The structure is supported by robust wooden framing, and the overall design is practical and typical of rural or peri-urban agricultural settings.
description: A rectangular wooden cowshed with a red gable metal roof and a large sliding barn door, designed for practical agricultural use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large sliding barn door with black metal hinges and the overhanging red gable roof.
description_view_1: Side gable end view displaying the triangular wooden wall beneath the red metal roof, with no doors or windows.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain horizontal wooden plank wall and the overhanging roof, with no visible openings.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end view, similar to view 1, with a plain triangular wooden wall and no visible features.
attribute_door_style: sliding barn door, vertically-planked wood with black metal hinges
